overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a dystopian underground medical clinic in a cyberpunk setting (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves through narrow industrial corridors into a larger neon-lit chamber with medical vendors, trash piles, and scattered NPCs, then exits up a stairway. The environment features heavy atmospheric haze, green and yellow neon lighting, and gritty industrial textures.

large piles of white garbage bags stacked against walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving through a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor. Concrete walls flank both sides with large piles of trash bags stacked against them. The camera approaches a bright neon light source at the corridor's end where a character stands near the glow.

entering area with bright green medical neon signs and fluorescent tubes

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a doorway marked with 'REGRETS' graffiti into a larger semi-open chamber. Bright green neon medical crosses and fluorescent lights illuminate the space. A political billboard appears on the right wall as the scene opens up to reveal standing characters and medical vendor stalls.

agents.ego_description: walking through main clinic area observing vendors and characters

vendor character standing behind table with medical supplies

entered.detail: yellow billboard showing man with glasses and text 'ELECTION KORT' with star symbol
metal table covered with white packages and medical supplies
stacked green crates labeled with medical symbols

segments.scene_description: Exploring the wide main chamber of the underground clinic, the camera passes a prominent yellow political billboard for 'KORT' on the right. The space features multiple medical vendor stalls with green neon crosses, stacked crates, and scattered characters including a vendor behind a supply table and a character in a pink jacket near the medical storage.

scene_state.functional_zone: back area of clinic with seating and trash storage

events.description: encountering characters sitting on red couch in dimly lit corner
moving into darker back area with single yellow wall light

agents.ego_description: walking through back area of the clinic passing characters on furniture

notable_agents.action: two characters sitting closely together on red couch, one with arm around the other

entered.detail: worn red fabric couch with two characters seated
large green industrial dumpster with lid
single warm yellow light fixture on concrete wall
dark doorway leading to stairs and exit

segments.scene_description: Moving into the darker back area of the clinic, the camera passes a red couch where two characters sit together. The lighting shifts to a single warm yellow wall light as the space becomes more cluttered with trash bags and green dumpsters. A doorway leading to stairs becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: beginning ascent up concrete stairs toward exit
approaching brighter light at top of stairway

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs leaving the underground clinic area

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase with red painted edges leading upward

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera ascending a steep concrete stairway to exit the underground clinic. The neon signs fade behind as the camera moves upward toward a brighter light at the top of the stairs, leaving the medical clinic area and returning to a corridor environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a sprawling neon-lit medical hub before ascending toward an exit. It begins by moving through a dimly lit passage flanked by concrete walls and piles of trash, drawing closer to a bright glow at the corridor's end. As the camera passes through a doorway marked with REGRETS graffiti, the space opens into a wide chamber illuminated by fluorescent lights and green neon medical crosses, where political billboards and vendor stalls populate the gritty environment. The scene then shifts toward the darker rear of the clinic, passing a red couch and cluttered dumpsters under a single warm yellow light before spotting a distant stairway. Finally, the camera ascends the steep concrete stairs, leaving the neon signs behind as it moves upward toward a brighter light and returns to a corridor setting.
